stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The figure shows a typical fuel plan for a Commercial Air Transport flight with operational impact factors as produced by a flight planning tool. Since the aeroplane has arrived late, it is planned to fly the next flight at a higher speed. Use the data below to calculate the revised total trip fuel.

Revised speed: M 0.80
Revised weight: 1500 kg down
Cruising Altitude: Planned Flight Level
